metadata.description: Claude Code skills for SignalCanvas development — Vue 3, PatchLang DSL, and code quality rules.

plugins.name: vue-best-practices
plugins.description: Vue 3 + TypeScript best practices: reactivity, SFC structure, composables, provide/inject, Pinia, component decomposition, file-size gates

plugins.name: patchlang
plugins.description: PatchLang DSL authoring: syntax, templates, instances, ports, bridges, and validation

plugins.name: code-rules
plugins.description: SignalCanvas code quality rules: file size, naming, DRY, no magic numbers, trash not rm
